members.name: GetFeatureName
members.summary: Returns the specified [param feature]'s human-readable name.

members.name: IsClassDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the class specified by [param class_name] is disabled. When disabled, the class won't appear in the Create New Node dialog.

members.name: IsClassEditorDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if editing for the class specified by [param class_name] is disabled. When disabled, the class will still appear in the Create New Node dialog but the Inspector will be read-only when selecting a node that extends the class.

members.name: IsClassPropertyDisabled
members.signature: public bool IsClassPropertyDisabled(StringName className, StringName property)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if [param property] is disabled in the class specified by [param class_name]. When a property is disabled, it won't appear in the Inspector when selecting a node that extends the class specified by [param class_name].

members.name: IsFeatureDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the [param feature] is disabled. When a feature is disabled, it will disappear from the editor entirely.

members.name: LoadFromFile
members.summary: Loads an editor feature profile from a file. The file must follow the JSON format obtained by using the feature profile manager's [b]Export[/b] button or the [method save_to_file] method. [b]Note:[/b] Feature profiles created via the user interface are loaded from the [code]feature_profiles[/code] directory, as a file with the [code].profile[/code] extension. The editor configuration folder can be found by using [method EditorPaths.get_config_dir].

members.name: SaveToFile
members.summary: Saves the editor feature profile to a file in JSON format. It can then be imported using the feature profile manager's [b]Import[/b] button or the [method load_from_file] method. [b]Note:[/b] Feature profiles created via the user interface are saved in the [code]feature_profiles[/code] directory, as a file with the [code].profile[/code] extension. The editor configuration folder can be found by using [method EditorPaths.get_config_dir].

members.name: SetDisableClass
members.signature: public void SetDisableClass(StringName className, bool disable)
members.summary: If [param disable] is [code]true[/code], disables the class specified by [param class_name]. When disabled, the class won't appear in the Create New Node dialog.

members.name: SetDisableClassEditor
members.signature: public void SetDisableClassEditor(StringName className, bool disable)
members.summary: If [param disable] is [code]true[/code], disables editing for the class specified by [param class_name]. When disabled, the class will still appear in the Create New Node dialog but the Inspector will be read-only when selecting a node that extends the class.

members.name: SetDisableClassProperty
members.signature: public void SetDisableClassProperty(StringName className, StringName property, bool disable)
members.summary: If [param disable] is [code]true[/code], disables editing for [param property] in the class specified by [param class_name]. When a property is disabled, it won't appear in the Inspector when selecting a node that extends the class specified by [param class_name].

members.name: SetDisableFeature
members.signature: public void SetDisableFeature(int feature, bool disable)
members.summary: If [param disable] is [code]true[/code], disables the editor feature specified in [param feature]. When a feature is disabled, it will disappear from the editor entirely.

values.name: FEATURE_3D
values.summary: The 3D editor. If this feature is disabled, the 3D editor won't display but 3D nodes will still display in the Create New Node dialog.

values.name: FEATURE_ASSET_LIB
values.summary: The Asset Store tab. If this feature is disabled, the Asset Store tab won't display.

values.name: FEATURE_FILESYSTEM_DOCK
values.summary: The FileSystem dock. If this feature is disabled, the FileSystem dock won't be visible.

values.name: FEATURE_GAME
values.summary: The Game tab, which allows embedding the game window and selecting nodes by clicking inside of it. If this feature is disabled, the Game tab won't display.

values.name: FEATURE_GROUPS_DOCK
values.summary: The Groups dock. If this feature is disabled, groups won't be visible and modifiable from the editor.

values.name: FEATURE_HISTORY_DOCK
values.summary: The History dock. If this feature is disabled, the History dock won't be visible.

values.name: FEATURE_IMPORT_DOCK
values.summary: The Import dock. If this feature is disabled, the Import dock won't be visible.

values.name: FEATURE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Feature] enum.

values.name: FEATURE_NODE_DOCK
values.summary: The Node dock. If this feature is disabled, signals and groups won't be visible and modifiable from the editor.

values.name: FEATURE_SCENE_TREE
values.summary: Scene tree editing. If this feature is disabled, the Scene tree dock will still be visible but will be read-only.

values.name: FEATURE_SCRIPT
values.summary: The Script tab, which contains the script editor and class reference browser. If this feature is disabled, the Script tab won't display.

values.name: FEATURE_SIGNALS_DOCK
values.summary: The Signals dock. If this feature is disabled, signals won't be visible and modifiable from the editor.
